AbstractBinderFactory - Class in com.qubitpi.aristotle.application
AbstractBinderFactory implements standard buildBinder functionality.

Allows additional app-specific binding.

afterRegistration(ResourceConfig) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.application.BinderFactory
Allows additional app-specific Jersey feature registration and config.

B

BasicBinderFactory - Class in com.qubitpi.aristotle.examples.basic.application
A demo binder factory.
BasicBinderFactory() - Constructor for class com.qubitpi.aristotle.examples.basic.application.BasicBinderFactory
 
BasicGraphStore - Class in com.qubitpi.aristotle.examples.basic.graphstore
BasicGraphStore shows that to have a full-fledged knowledge-graph service running, we only need to implement our own GraphStore to make it running.
BasicGraphStore() - Constructor for class com.qubitpi.aristotle.examples.basic.graphstore.BasicGraphStore
Constructor used for dependency injection.
BinderFactory - Interface in com.qubitpi.aristotle.application
A binder factory builds a custom binder for the Jersey application.

All queryable book ID's.
buildBinder() - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.application.AbstractBinderFactory

Builds a hk2 Binder instance.
buildGraphStore() - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.application.AbstractBinderFactory
Returns an implementation class of GraphStore that will be bound as a Jersey resource.
buildGraphStore() - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.examples.basic.application.BasicBinderFactory

getBooleanProperty(String) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.SystemConfig
Returns property value as boolean value wrapped inside an Optional for a key or empty if no such property exists.
getData(String) - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.endpoints.DataServlet
Query graph data via GraphQL GET.
getDoubleProperty(String) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.SystemConfig
Returns property value as a double wrapped inside an Optional for a key or empty if no such property exists.
getFloatProperty(String) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.SystemConfig
Returns property value as float value wrapped inside an Optional for a key or empty if no such property exists.

Returns an instance of SystemConfig.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.examples.basic.graphstore.GraphQLFactory
Returns a fully initialized GraphQL API instance ready for querying.
getIntProperty(String) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.SystemConfig
Returns property value as int value wrapped inside an Optional for a key or empty if no such property exists.
getLoggingFormat() - Method in enum com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.ErrorMessageFormat
 
getLoggingFormat() - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.MessageFormatter
Returns the message format used for logging.
getLongProperty(String) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.SystemConfig
Returns property value as long value wrapped inside an Optional for a key or empty if no such property exists.
getMessageFormat() - Method in enum com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.ErrorMessageFormat
 
getMessageFormat() - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.MessageFormatter
Returns the message used for publishing out of the system, typically in error messages.
getPackageVariableName(String) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.SystemConfig
Gets a package scoped variable name.
getStringProperty(String) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.SystemConfig
Returns property value as String value wrapped inside an Optional for a key or empty if no such property exists.
GraphQLFactory - Class in com.qubitpi.aristotle.examples.basic.graphstore
GraphQLFactory is loaded statically and is, therefore, thread-safe.
GraphQLFactory() - Constructor for class com.qubitpi.aristotle.examples.basic.graphstore.GraphQLFactory
 
GraphStore - Interface in com.qubitpi.aristotle.graphstore
A GraphStore is an abstraction layer between Aristotle's application layer and the sea of graph data.

MessageFormatter - Interface in com.qubitpi.aristotle.config
MessageFormatter provides shared functionality to provide formatted logging and messaging.

When meta data not found.
MISSING_MAP_KEY - com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.ErrorMessageFormat

The resource configuration for the Aristotle web applications.

S

setProperty(String, String) - Method in interface com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.SystemConfig
Sets property value for a key.
SYSTEM_CONFIG_LOADING_ERROR_MESSAGE - com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.ErrorMessageFormat
When SystemConfig initialization fails.
SystemConfig - Interface in com.qubitpi.aristotle.config
SystemConfig is an interface for retrieving configuration values, allowing for implicit type conversion and use of a runtime properties interface to override configured settings.
SystemConfigFactory - Class in com.qubitpi.aristotle.config
SystemConfigFactory provides a SystemConfig instance.

T

TOP_ID_NOT_FOUND - com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.ErrorMessageFormat
When a client request does not have a top-level selection "id" argument.
TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor - Class in com.qubitpi.aristotle.web
TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor is a visitor that, by the end of its visit of a Document, returns the first selection field argument value whose key is "id".
TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor() - Constructor for class com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
 

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.ErrorMessageFormat
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.ErrorMessageFormat
Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum com.qubitpi.aristotle.config.ErrorMessageFormat
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.ErrorMessageFormat
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
visitArgument(Argument, TraverserContext<Node>) - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
Visits an Argument and, if the argument key is "id", picks up the value of that argument as a string value and make it as the return value of TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor.getArgumentValue().
visitDocument(Document, TraverserContext<Node>) - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
Visits the first definition, which must be a OperationDefinition, in a specified Document.
visitField(Field, TraverserContext<Node>) - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
Visits all Arguments of a specified Field and picks up the value of the argument, whose key is "id", as the return value of TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor.getArgumentValue().
visitOperationDefinition(OperationDefinition, TraverserContext<Node>) - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
Visits the SelectionSet, which must exist, of a specified OperationDefinition.
visitSelectionSet(SelectionSet, TraverserContext<Node>) - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
Visits the first Selection, which must be a Field, within a specified SelectionSet.
visitStringValue(StringValue, TraverserContext<Node>) - Method in class com.qubitpi.aristotle.web.TopSelectionFieldIdArgumentExtractor
Visits a specified StringValue node and always assign the value to the target argument value, i.e.
